birds.evidence: 144"/> A study published in 2003 identified the species being endemic to China, and identified the Hengduan Mountains as the main area of endemism, but the bird also occurs in the Anjaw district of Arunachal Pradesh in India. The Yunnan nuthatch is a sedentary species

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The fire-capped tit (Cephalopyrus flammiceps) is a small, long, weighing about bird species assigned to the family Paridae, that breeds in the temperate forest bordering the Himalayas to the south, in the Hengduan Shan and Nujiang Shan on the Myanmar-China border, the Micah Shan and Daba Shan on the Northern Sichuan border

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Its breeding range extends from eastern Afghanistan to the Hengduan Mountains; it winters in India and northwestern Indochina
